description: Fantasy adventure ruleset with d20 rolls, three core classes, and class-specific actions.

classes.label: Fighter
classes.description: A master of martial combat, skilled with a variety of weapons and armor.

classes.label: Rogue
classes.description: A scoundrel who uses stealth and trickery to overcome obstacles and enemies.

classes.label: Wizard
classes.description: A scholarly magic-user capable of manipulating the structures of reality.

actions.label: Great Weapon Attack
actions.description: Swing a heavy melee weapon with devastating force.

roll.successRule: Roll 1d20 + Strength modifier + proficiency vs target AC. Meet or beat AC to hit; add weapon damage on a hit.

actions.label: Second Wind
actions.description: Regain stamina in the heat of battle.

roll.successRule: Recover 1d10 + fighter level hit points. Usable once per short rest.

actions.label: Action Surge
actions.description: Push beyond your limits to act again immediately.

roll.successRule: Take one additional action on your turn. Usable once per short rest.

actions.label: Sneak Attack
actions.description: Strike when the enemy is distracted or you have advantage.

roll.successRule: On a hit with a finesse or ranged weapon, add extra damage (1d6 at level 1). Requires advantage or an ally adjacent to the target.

actions.label: Cunning Action
actions.description: Dash, Disengage, or Hide as a bonus action.

roll.successRule: Use Dash, Disengage, or Hide as a bonus action on your turn.

actions.label: Thieves' Tools
actions.description: Pick a lock or disarm a trap with practiced hands.

roll.successRule: Roll 1d20 + Dexterity modifier + proficiency vs DC set by the DM. Success opens the lock or disables the trap.

actions.label: Fire Bolt
actions.description: Hurl a mote of fire at a creature in range.

roll.successRule: Ranged spell attack: roll 1d20 + Intelligence modifier + proficiency vs target AC. On a hit, deal 1d10 fire damage.

actions.label: Magic Missile
actions.description: Create three glowing darts of magical force that unerringly strike your target.

roll.successRule: Automatically hits. Three darts each deal 1d4 + 1 force damage (no attack roll required).

actions.label: Burning Hands
actions.description: Sweep flames from your fingertips in a 15-foot cone.

roll.successRule: Creatures in the cone make a Dexterity saving throw vs your spell save DC. On a failed save, take 3d6 fire damage; half on a success.

skillCheck.successRule: Roll 1d20 + modifiers vs DC. Default DC 15 if not specified.

attributeCheck.successRule: Roll 1d20 + modifiers vs DC. Default DC 15 if not specified.
